prompt: Show toast notification when proof image successfully updated
expected_avoid: alert() — blocking browser primitive, not a toast
react-toastify imported fresh when @dash/toast already exists in the registry — prefer Dash registry
permanent toast with no auto-dismiss (clutters the screen)
error-variant toast for a success outcome
expected_use: toast() from the Dash registry (@dash/toast) OR the resident react-toastify if surrounding page already uses it (page-consistent)
Bahasa Indonesia message — e.g. 'Bukti pengambilan ter-update' for pickup proof, 'Bukti pengantaran ter-update' for delivery proof (context-aware)
success variant (green semantic) — toast.success(...) or @dash/toast variant='success'
Auto-dismiss after ~3-4 seconds (default toast lifetime is fine)
Triggered on the resolved Promise of the axios POST to the proof-update endpoint, not optimistically before the response lands
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Feedback / Notifications (rules L78-83 family); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'alert() as feedback' (Phase 0.1 implication); Dash voice — Bahasa default for backoffice operator UI; next-backoffice-web react-toastify residency (rules L394)
context_notes: Backoffice operators are Indonesian-speaking — English-only success messages are a recurring drift. Pickup vs delivery proof context comes from the parent page (delivery detail knows which type it's editing). Toast must fire on the resolved Promise only — premature optimistic toast misleads operators when the BE actually rejected the update (e.g., audit log insert failed). Severity low because the failure mode here is mostly cosmetic — the audit trail and the storage paths from fixtures 01-04 are what carry the regulatory weight.
